plan_metadata.name: group  validation openai repairs in teams

description.other: faked openAI key, it returns error in response

steps.description: @assertion there's "How can I help you today?" exist.
Click inside the "Type a message" input field in the Microsoft Teams app to prepare for entering text.
Type text 'List all repairs without auth' into the message input field in the Microsoft Teams chat interface for the 'vscuse_app_XYepPlocal' channel.
Press "Enter" key to submit the text input "List all repairs without auth" in the chat field of the VS Teams bot interface within Microsoft Teams.
